review.note: AI-drafted first pass - SME review required before production

sources.title: Grade 7 - Term 2: The Transatlantic slave trade
Olaudah Equiano, enslaved person and writer, dies
African captives aboard the Amistad revolt
Nat Turner leads a slave insurrection in Southampton, Virginia, USA
William Wilberforce, English philanthropist and champion of the abolishment of the slave trade, is born
British Parliament passes the Abolition of the Slave Trade Act
Slavery abolished throughout the British Empire

slides.title: Ukurhweba Ngeengqila Ngaphetjheya kwe-Atlantiki
slides.lead: Indlela iingidi zabantu be-Afrika ezathunjwa ngayo, zathwalwa ngeenkepe zawela ilwandle i-Atlantiki, begodu zabotjhelelwa ebugqileni - nendlela irhwebo leli elagcina liphelisiwe ngayo.

media.alt: Imephu etjengisa imisibe emithathu iwela ilwandle i-Atlantiki hlangana ne-Yurophu, i-Afrika ne-Amerika, yakha unxantathu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#eaf1f4'/><path d='M40 30 h34 v18 h-34 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 60 q26 -10 40 20 q6 40 -18 60 q-30 8 -34 -30 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M30 96 q22 -6 30 24 q-2 34 -26 30 q-18 -30 -4 -54 Z' fill='#a9865a'/><path d='M76 40 q60 8 78 34' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#a)'/><path d='M172 96 q-70 20 -128 12' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M40 96 q10 -30 40 -52' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='160' cy='150' r='0'/></svg>

slides.notes: Vula ngokutjhejisisa. Hlathulula bona isifundwesi siqalene nomlando obuhlungu lapho abantu bamambala batlhaga khulu khona, begodu sisifunda ngehlonipho. Beka iimpheko ezine zendaba esizoyilandela: ukuthunjwa e-Afrika, ikhambo lelwandle elibizwa nge-Middle Passage, ubugqila e-Amerika, nomzabalazo omude wokuqeda (ukuphelisa) irhwebo. Tjheja bona iSewula Afrika inomlando wayo wobugqila ohlobene nalo eKapa.

slides.title: Bekuyini ukurhweba ngeengqila ngaphetjheya kwe-Atlantiki?
slides.lead: Iminyaka engaba ma-350, abarhwebi be-Yurophu bathenga bathwala ngeenkepe abantu be-Afrika ababuthwe ebugqileni bawela ilwandle i-Atlantiki.

blocks.text: Kusukela ngeenkulungwana zabo-1500 kuya kwezabo-1800, amazwe we-Yurophu njenge-Portugal, i-Britain, i-France, i-Spain ne-Netherlands athumba namkha athenga abantu be-Afrika bawathwala ngeenkepe bawasa eemkolonini e-Amerika. Lapho babotjhelelwa bona basebenze ngaphandle kokubhadelwa nangaphandle kwekululeko.

items: 'Transatlantic' kutjho 'ngaphetjheya kwelwandle i-Atlantiki'.
Abezomlando balinganisa bona ama-Afrika angaba yisigidi ezili-12 athwalwa ngeenkepe awela i-Atlantiki.
Abantu ababuthwe ebugqileni bebaphathwa njengempahla ebeyingathengwa ithengiswe.

slides.notes: Qinisekisa bona abafundi bayalizwisisa ibizo elithi 'obuthwe ebugqileni' - umuntu owenziwe igqila ngabanye, ingasi igqila ngokwemvelo. Sebenzisa 'umuntu obuthwe ebugqileni' kunokuthi 'igqila' ukugcina ubuntu bomuntu bubonakala. [SME] Isibalo esingaba yisigidi ezili-12 zabathunjiweyo esathwalwa ngeenkepe silinganiso esisetjenziswa kabanzi esivela ku-Trans-Atlantic Slave Trade Database; qinisekisa amagama wamambala owafunako bona abafundi bawakhumbule.

slides.title: Irhwebo lonxantathu
slides.lead: Iinkepe bezikhamba indlela enamahlangothi amathathu hlangana ne-Yurophu, i-Afrika ne-Amerika, zenza inzuzo esiteshini ngasinye.

items: I-Yurophu ukuya e-Afrika: iinkepe bezithwala iimbhamu, iindwangu, utjwala neempahla zensimbi ukuze zithengiselane ngabantu.
I-Afrika ukuya e-Amerika: ama-Afrika abuthwe ebugqileni bewafakwa gxishagxisha eenkepeni enzelwa i-Middle Passage.
I-Amerika ukuya e-Yurophu: iinkepe bezibuya zizele ushukela, ukotini, ugwayi nekhofi.

columns.text: Iimkoloni ze-Yurophu e-Amerika bezitlhoga inengi elikhulu labasebenzi eemsimini zazo. Umsebenzi wabantu be-Afrika ababuthwe ebugqileni wenza abanikazi nabarhwebi banjinga khulu, ngalokho irhwebo lakhula laya likhula khulu.

media.alt: Umdwebo wonxantathu one-Yurophu ngaphezulu, i-Afrika ngezasi ngesidleni ne-Amerika ngezasi ngesinceleni, imisibe igijima izombeleze.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 170' role='img'><rect width='220' height='170' fill='#f4efe6'/><polygon points='110,24 40,140 180,140' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='110' cy='24' r='7' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='40' cy='140' r='7' fill='#a9865a'/><circle cx='180' cy='140' r='7' fill='#7a8b5a'/><text x='110' y='14' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' fill='#333'>Europe</text><text x='30' y='158' font-size='11' fill='#333'>Americas</text><text x='158' y='158' font-size='11' fill='#333'>Africa</text></svg>

slides.notes: Sebenzisa umdwebo wonxantathu ukwenza indlela ibonakale kuhle. Gandelela bona abantu bebayimithwalo ephekweni yesibili - i-Middle Passage - okuhlolwa ziislayidi ezilandelako. Buza abafundi bona kubayini abarhwebi bebacabanga bona indlelakwenza le izuzisa, uwabize inyaya: izuzisa bani, begodu ngeendleko zabantu ezinganani?

slides.title: Ukuthunjwa e-Afrika
slides.lead: Abantu bebabanjwa emahlaselweni neempini, bese baqhutjhwa baya ngelwandle bathengiswe.

blocks.text: Inengi labantu ababuthwe ebugqileni bebavela eTjhingalanga naphakathi ne-Afrika. Abanye bebathunjwa emahlaselweni namkha eempini, abanye babiwa. Bebabotjhelelwa bona bakhambe amabanga amade ukuya ngelwandle, kanengi baboshwe ngeenketani, babotjhwe eentronkweni ezibizwa nge-'slave forts' namkha 'dungeons' eendaweni njenge-Elmina ne-Goree Island.

items: Imindeni beyihlukaniswa begodu bebangasabonani kuhle.
Abathunjiweyo bebathengiselwa abarhwebi be-Yurophu ngokutjhintjhiselana ngeempahla.
Bebatjhiswa ngophawu babotjhwe eenqabeni ezigcweleko ngaphambi kokulayitjhwa eenkepeni.

media.alt: Inqaba yamatje ekhunjini eqadi kwelwandle, inekepe encani elwandle.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#eaf1f4'/><rect y='108' width='240' height='52' fill='#7fa9b8'/><rect x='24' y='150' width='120' height='10' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='30' y='64' width='96' height='48' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='30' y='54' width='16' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='58' y='54' width='16' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='86' y='54' width='16' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='110' y='54' width='16' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='66' y='84' width='16' height='28' fill='#5c4a30'/><path d='M180 96 l10 -30 l10 30 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='189' y='60' width='2' height='36' fill='#5c4a30'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha islayidi lesi ngokutjhejisisa nangokuzwelana. Gandelela bona abathunjiweyo bebabantu abajayelekileko - abalimi, ababelethi, abantwana - ingasi izigebengu. Tjho bona abanye ababusi nabarhwebi be-Afrika nabo bebahlanganyela ekuthengiseni abathunjiweyo, kodwana isidingo nobukhulu obukhulu bebuvela eemkolonini ze-Yurophu. Balekela iinathamba ezicacileko; nyala ekulahlekelweni yikululeko nomndeni.

slides.title: I-Middle Passage
slides.lead: Ikhambo lelwandle elimbi eliwela i-Atlantiki ebeligcina amaveke amanengi.

blocks.text: I-'Middle Passage' bekulikhambo lokuwela ilwandle i-Atlantiki, ipheko ephakathi yerhwebo lonxantathu. Amakhulu wabantu bebafakwa gxishagxisha ngaphasi kwedeki banommoya, ukudla namanzi okumancani. Amalwelwe bekusabalala msinyana begodu abanengi abazange baphile ekhambeni.

items: Abathunjiweyo bebaboshwe ndawonye ngeenketani banganandawo yokunyakaza.
Ukuwela bekungathatha amaveke amahlanu ukuya eenyangeni ezintathu.
Abezomlando balinganisa bona munye kwabalikhomba babathunjiweyo wahlongakala ngesikhathi sekhambo.

media.alt: Ikepe eseyila phezu kwamagagasi anamandla iwela ilwandle.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#dce8ec'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#4f7f92'/><path d='M60 104 h120 l-16 26 h-88 Z' fill='#5c4a30'/><rect x='116' y='40' width='4' height='66' fill='#3d3222'/><path d='M120 46 l44 20 l-44 12 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M116 46 l-40 20 l40 12 Z' fill='#e7ddc9'/><path d='M0 132 q30 -12 60 0 q30 12 60 0 q30 -12 60 0 q30 12 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#eaf1f4' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Le yihliziyo yamazizo yesifundo - yigcine iliqiniso begodu inehlonipho, ingabi yikaringo. Hlathulula bona abasindileyo be-Middle Passage bafika babuthakathaka, bethukiwe begodu bakude nekhaya, bakhuluma iindimi ezinengi ezihlukeneko. [SME] Isibalo esithi 'munye kwabalikhomba wahlongakala' (malungana namaphesenti ali-15, malungana neengidi ezi-1.8 zabahlongakeleko sekusekoke) silinganiso esikhulunywa kabanzi; qinisekisa isibalo esiqinileko nobude bekhambo obufunako ngaphambi kokugadangisa.

slides.title: Bathengiswa efandisini
slides.lead: Nekufika iinkepe, abasindileyo bebathengiswa njengeempahla kolo obhida ngokuphezulu khulu.

blocks.text: Emazibukweni we-Brazil, iimhlengele ye-Caribbean neTlhagwini ye-Amerika, ama-Afrika abuthwe ebugqileni bewahlolwa athengiselwe emafandisini womphakathi. Abathengi bebabhadela imali ngabantu, begodu imindeni ebeyisindile ekhambeni ndawonye beyihlukaniswa godu efandisini.

items: Abantu ababuthwe ebugqileni bebanikelwa amabizo amatjha begodu bebanganamalungelo ngokomthetho.
Bebangathengwa, bathengiswe, bajeziswe namkha baphiwe ngabanikazi babo.
Inengi bewathunyelwa eemsimini ebeyitjala ushukela, ukotini nogwayi.

media.alt: Isikhundla sefandisi esiphakemeko esinomuntu ojame kuso nesiqubuthu esincani ngaphasi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='70' y='96' width='80' height='16' fill='#8a6a3a'/><rect x='78' y='112' width='10' height='24' fill='#5c4a30'/><rect x='132' y='112' width='10' height='24' fill='#5c4a30'/><circle cx='110' cy='72' r='11' fill='#a9865a'/><rect x='103' y='84' width='14' height='14' fill='#a9865a'/><g fill='#7a8b5a'><circle cx='40' cy='120' r='8'/><circle cx='60' cy='124' r='8'/><circle cx='166' cy='122' r='8'/><circle cx='186' cy='120' r='8'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Qinisa umbono wokuthi ubugqila bebususa ubuntu: abantu baphathwa njengempahla ebekwa intengo bese ithengiswe. Hlanganisa nemibono yobulungiswa namalungelo wabantu abafundi asele bawazi. Veza bona iimvuno efanako - ushukela, ukotini, ugwayi - ibuyela e-Yurophu ngepheko yesithathu yonxantathu, kubophelele indlelakwenza yoke ndawonye.

slides.title: Ipilo eemsimini
slides.lead: Abantu ababuthwe ebugqileni bebasebenza amahora amade, abudisi ngaphasi kokulawulwa okunzima.

blocks.text: Eemsimini, abantu ababuthwe ebugqileni bebasebenza kusukela ekuphumeni kwelanga bekulitjhona ngaphandle kokubhadelwa. Ababonisi bebasebenzisa isijeziso esibukhali ukubotjhelela abantu bona balalele. Nanyana kunelunya leli, imiphakathi ebuthwe ebugqileni yagcina ubuntu bayo buphila ngomculo, ngokuhloma iindaba, ngekolo nangokubambelela eenkhumbulweni zekhaya.

items: Umsebenzi bewuhlanganisa ukutjala nokusika umoba, nokukha ukotini.
Abantu ababuthwe ebugqileni bebanokudla okumancani, indawo yokuhlala embi begodu banganakululeko yokukhamba.
Iindimi, ukudla namasiko we-Afrika kwasinda kwabumba amasiko amatjha.

media.alt: Imigqa yezitjalo ezide esimini kunesakhiwo esincani buqamama ngaphasi kwelanga elitjhisako.

slides.notes: Linganisa itlhago nesithunzi sabantu nokujamelana ngamasiko: abantu ababuthwe ebugqileni bebangasi zisulu ezingenzikutho. Hlathulula bona amasiko ahlanganisiweko akhula njani e-Amerika (umculo, ukudla, ikolo) asabumba iphasi nanamhlanjesi. Lokhu kubeka islayidi esilandelako sokujamelana okusebenzako neenhlubuko.

slides.title: Ukujamelana nobugqila
slides.lead: Abantu ababuthwe ebugqileni bajamelana ngeendlela ezinengi zesibindi, ezikhulu nezincani.

blocks.heading: Ukujamelana kwaqobe langa
blocks.text: Ukusebenza kancani, ukuphula amathulusi, ukubaleka nokugcina amasiko we-Afrika aphila.

blocks.heading: Iinhlubuko
blocks.text: Iinhlubuko njengokuhlubuka kwekepe i-Amistad (1839) nokuhlubuka kwaka-Nat Turner e-Virginia (1831).

blocks.heading: Imiphakathi ekhululekileko
blocks.text: Abantu ababalekileko bakha imiphakathi efihliweko ye-'maroon' balwela ukuhlala bakhululekile.

slides.notes: Gandelela ikghono lokuzenzela: abantu ababuthwe ebugqileni bebahlala bajamelana. Abathunjiweyo be-Amistad bathumba ikepe yabo bagcina baphumelele ikululeko yabo ecaleni lekhotho elidumileko; u-Nat Turner wahlahla ihlubuko elinehlomo elarhirhidla iSewula ye-Amerika. Bobabili bavela endaweni yokugcina i-SAHO yeenehlakalo ezinamalanga. Gcina imininingwana ilingene ubudala begodu unyale isibindi nesifiso sekululeko.

slides.title: U-Olaudah Equiano ulandisa indaba yakhe
slides.lead: Indoda ebeyibuthwe ebugqileni yatlola incwadi edumileko ehlathulula lokho eyaphila kikho.

blocks.text: Imikghonyo yabafazi, nokububula kwabahlongakalako, kwenza yoke into ibe sibonakalo sokwesabeka okumangaliso okungathelekelelekiko.

U-Olaudah Equiano wathunjwa e-Afrika asesemntwana wasinda i-Middle Passage. Ngemva kokuthenga ikululeko yakhe, watlola incwadi ngepilo yakhe. Indaba yakhe yasiza abantu abanengi eBritain bona bazwisise ilunya lerhwebo leengqila begodu basekele ukuliphelisa.

items: Incwadi yakhe beyingenye yeendaba zokuthoma ezatlolwa ngum-Afrika obekabuthwe ebugqileni.
Wakhamba wakhuluma aphikisa irhwebo leengqila.
Amalizwi njengelakhe asiza ukukhulisa umnyakazo wokuqeda ubugqila.

slides.notes: Hlathulula amandla wofakazi wokuthoma: iimbalo zingazwakala zikude, kodwana amagama ka-Equiano enza iqiniso labantu licace. [SME] Umumo lo uvela ku-Interesting Narrative ka-Equiano yango-1789 begodu ukhitjhwa kabanzi; sibawa uqinisekise amagama wamambala nesitho sekhasi maqondana nomhlobo osayensi ngaphambi kokuveza, ngombana kunemihlobo eminengi ehlukene kancani ejikelezako.

slides.title: Ukuqeda irhwebo leengqila
slides.lead: Ngemva kweminyaka yomkhankaso, kwaphasiswa imithetho yokuqeda (ukuphelisa) irhwebo bese kwaqedwa ubugqila ngokwabo.

blocks.text: 'Ukuqedwa' kutjho ukuphelisa into. Abakhankasi ababizwa ngaboqedubugqila, kunye nabantu ababukade babuthwe ebugqileni, baphikisa bathi ubugqila bebumbi begodu bekufuze buqedwe. EBritain, u-**William Wilberforce** wahlahla ilwelo ePalamende.

items: 1807: iBritain yaphasisa umthetho wokuqeda irhwebo leengqila (ukuthenga nokuthwala abantu ngeenkepe).
1833-1834: ubugqila ngokwabo baqedwa kiyo yoke i-British Empire, kubandakanya iKapa.
Ubugqila baphela ngemva kwesikhathi kwamanye amazwe - i-USA ngo-1865 ne-Brazil ngo-1888.

media.alt: Iinketani ezimbili ezivulekileko, ezephukileko ilanga liphuma ngemva kwazo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='110' cy='96' r='30' fill='#e8a13a' opacity='0.4'/><g fill='none' stroke='#5c4a30' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='70' cy='84' r='14'/><circle cx='86' cy='100' r='14'/><circle cx='134' cy='84' r='14'/><circle cx='150' cy='100' r='14'/></g><line x1='100' y1='92' x2='120' y2='92' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='10'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlathulula umahluko phakathi kokuqeda irhwebo (1807) nokuqeda ubugqila ngokwabo (1833-1834) - indawo yokudideka ejayelekileko. Tjheja bona ukuqedwa akhenge kulethe ukulingana ngokurhabako; abantu ababukade babuthwe ebugqileni basese bebaqalene netlhago elikhulu. Hlanganisa ngokunqophileko neSewula Afrika: ubugqila eKapa baphela njengengcenye yokuqedwa kwe-British Empire ngo-1834.

slides.title: Amalanga aqakathekileko werhwebo leengqila laphetjheya kwe-Atlantiki

events.label: Irhwebo leengqila laphetjheya kwe-Atlantiki liyathoma ukukhula
U-Olaudah Equiano ugadangisa indaba yepilo yakhe
I-Brazil iqeda ubugqila - inarha yokugcina e-Amerika

slides.notes: Sebenzisa ihla-landelano ukuhlanganisa isifundo soke ngaphambi kweslayidi selifa. Bawa abafundi bona batjheje bona irhwebo laphila iinkulungwana kodwana ukuliqeda kwathatha amashumi weminyaka womkhankaso nawo. Veza ilanga leKapa (1834) ukuze indaba ihlangane nomlando wenarha yabo.

slides.title: Ilifa lerhwebo leengqila
slides.lead: Imithelela yerhwebo leengqila isezwakala ephasini loke nanamhlanjesi.

blocks.text: Irhwebo leengqila lahlakaza iingidi zabantu be-Afrika e-Amerika nangaphetjheya, lakha lokho esikubiza nge-African diaspora (ukuhlakazeka kwama-Afrika ephasini loke). Laletha itlhago elimbi, kodwana abantu be-Afrika godu babumba ilimi, umculo, ukudla namasiko wamazwe amanengi. Umlando walo webandlululo nokungalingani usaqalwana nawo nanamhlanjesi.

items: EKapa, abantu ababuthwe ebugqileni abavela e-Afrika ne-Asia basiza ukubumba umphakathi weSewula Afrika nomphakathi we-Cape Malay.
Umculo namasiko we-Afrika kwathinta i-jazz, i-blues nomunye umculo wephasi.
Ukufunda umlando lo kusisiza ukujamelana nobugqila nebandlululo nanamhlanjesi.

slides.notes: Yisa indaba ekhaya eSewula Afrika: iKapa beyinerhwebo layo leengqila, begodu i-Slave Lodge eKapa ikhumbula umlando lo. Gandelela ukuqina nomnikelo wesiko wabantu ababuthwe ebugqileni nezizukulwana zabo, ukuze abafundi bakhambe nendaba eneqiniso kunye nomuzwa wesithunzi sabantu nethemba.

slides.title: Lokho esikufundileko
slides.lead: Irhwebo leengqila laphetjheya kwe-Atlantiki labotjhelela iingidi zama-Afrika ebugqileni, kodwana abantu bajamelana begodu ekugcineni laqedwa.

blocks.text: Silandele indaba kusukela **ekuthunjweni** e-Afrika, sawela i-**Middle Passage**, sangena **ebugqileni** e-Amerika, sadlula nomzabalazo omude **wokuqedwa**. Nje-ke tjengisa lokho okufundileko.

blocks.question: Hlathulula bona 'irhwebo lonxantathu' bekuyini begodu uhlathulule iimpheko ezintathu zekhambo.
Kubayini i-Middle Passage beyisipiliyoni esimbi kangaka ema-Afrikeni abuthwe ebugqileni?
Hlathulula iindlela ezimbili abantu ababuthwe ebugqileni abajamelana ngazo nobugqila, begodu uhlathulule bona 'ukuqedwa' kutjho ukuthini.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi otloliweko namkha ingxoxo yeklasi; ukwabiwa kwamaphuzu kulandela iindlela ze-CAPS ezisekelwe emithonjeni nokutlola isigaba. Buyela emagameni aqakathekileko: obuthwe ebugqileni, transatlantic, Middle Passage, isimu, ukujamelana, ukuqedwa. Phetha ngokukhumbuza abafundi bona ukufunda umlando lo kusisiza ukuqakathekisa ikululeko namalungelo wabantu nanamhlanjesi.
